DISCOVERY 612, HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: DEFENDANTS COVERCLICKS MEDIA, INC., COVERCLICKS LLC, AFFILIATENETWORK.COM, LLC, MYTRUEPROMOTIONS, LLC, WINHUNDRED, LLC'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER RE: DEPOSITION OF PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE MAY BE REQUIRED TO SIT FOR DEPOSITION IN THE COUNTY WHERE THE ACTION IS PENDING WHEN DEFENDANT HAS NOT DESIGNATED ANY EXECUTIVE OR BUSINESS OFFICE. THE DEPOSITIONS WERE NOT PROPERLY NOTICED TO TAKE PLACE IN SAN MATEO COUNTY, BUT THEY MAY BE NOTICED TO TAKE PLACE IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. COUNSEL SHALL MEET AND CONFER TO SET A DATE AND TIME FOR THE DEPOSITIONS SO THAT THEY MAY BE COMPLETED NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 5, 2009. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Re: Deposition Of Person Most Knowledgeable And For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ory Sandel, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Daniel L. Balsam
No other appearances.

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED as modified: Defendants Coverclicks Media, Inc., Coverclicks LLC, Affiliatenetwork.Com, LLC, Mytruepromotions, LLC, Winhundred, LLC's Motion For Protective Order Re: Deposition Of Person Most Knowledgeable is denied. Defendant's person most knowledgeable may be required to sit for deposition in the county where the action is pending when defendant has not designated any executive or business office. The depositions were not properly noticed to take place in San Mateo County, but they may be noticed to take place in San Francisco County. Counsel shall meet and confer to set a date and time for the depositions so that they may be completed no later than NOVEMBER 5, 2009. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
